generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security and stability, I've been concerned about our nation's over-reliance on foreign technology for critical infrastructure. Did you know that 78% of our allies have already implemented domestic strategic autonomy programs? It's not just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring our families and communities are protected from unexpected disruptions. We owe it to future generations to take this responsible step. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
